infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Find and manage contacts through Jarvis
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: View and manage your schedule through Jarvis
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Share photos and files with Jarvis
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Save generated images to your photos

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Record audio and video for Jarvis

plugins.contactsPermission: Jarvis needs contacts to help you find people.

plugins.calendarPermission: Jarvis needs calendar access to manage your schedule.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Jarvis uses your location for context-aware help.

plugins.photosPermission: Save generated images to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Save generated images to your photo library.
